titleStmt.title: SII 5.637: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 637. (A.R. No. 78-A of 1895). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiru manni vaḷara Irunila maṭant Aiyum porcceyap pāvaiyum cirt
tanic celviyum tan perun=te viyarāki Inpuṟa neṭutuyaruḻiyu ḷiṭaituṟaināṭum tuṭarvanavelip paṭar vanavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻ
matiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭa liḻattaraiyarta muṭiyum Āṅkavan teviya roṅ
keḻil muṭiyum mun navarpakkal tennavan vaiytta cun=ta ramuṭiyu min=ti ra nāramum tenṟicai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum
Eṟipaṭaikkeraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyil cūṭum kulatanamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatirvelait tolpe
ruṅ kāval pala paḻan=ti vum ceruviṟ cinavi Irupattorukā laracukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāman melvaruñ cān=ti maṟṟivaraṇ karuti Irutti
ya cempoṟ ṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭ ṭoḷitta cayaciṅkan Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭu piṭiya
l Iraṭṭapāṭi Ēḻarai Ilakkamum navanetik kulapperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirar cakkarakoṭṭamum
mutirpaṭa valla maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭai vaḷarkāmaṇaykkoṇaiyum veñcilai virar pa
ñcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaiy paḻana mācuṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇkirttiy yāti nakaravai
yil can=ti ran tolkulat tin=ti ratanai viḷai yamarkaḷattuk kiḷai yoṭum piṭittu
palatanattoṭum niṟaikulatanak kuvaiyum kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai yoṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcura
rcer nalk kocalaināṭum tanmapālanai vemmunai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭa
puttiyum Iraṇacūranai muraṇukat tākki tikkaṇakirttit takkaṇalāṭamum kovi(c)can=ta n
māviḻin=to ṭa taṅkātacāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaṭal caṅkuvoṭṭai mahipālanai
veñcamarviḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yānaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila
neṭuṅkaṭa luttiralāṭamum veṟimalart tirttat teṟipunal kaṅkaiyum Alai
kaṭal naṭuvuḷ pala kalañ celutti caṅkirāmavicaiyottuṅkapanamakākiya kaṭārat
taraiyanai vākaiyamporukaṭal kumpaṟkariyoṭu makappaṭut turimaiyil piṟakkiya pe
rune]tit tiṟakkamum Ārttavan nakar(nakar) porttoḻil vācalil viccātira toraṇamum mo
yttoḷir punamaṇip putavamum kanamaṇik katavamum niṟai śrī vicaiyamum tuṟainirp pannaiyum vanmalaiyūrai
yiṟ ṟonmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭa lakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭi(li)ṅkamum kalaṅkā valvinai Ilaṅkācokamum koppuṟa niṟai
punal māpappāḷamum kāvalan(p)puricai mevilimpaṅkamum viḷappantūṟuṭaivaḷaipantūṟum kalaittak
kor pukaḻ talaittakkolamum titamā palvinai mātamaliṅkamum kalāmuṟil [kaṭu- n=ti ṟi] l lāmuritecamum
tenakkalarpoḻil mānakkavāramum toṭukaṭal kāval kaṭumural kaṭāramum māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa ko
pparakecaripanma rāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājendra coḻade varkku yāṇṭu 10 7 Āvatu Irājentra ciṅkavaḷanāṭṭup poykai
nāṭṭu tirumaḻuvāṭi mahāde varkku Uyyakkoṇṭānvaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu keraḷān=ta kaccaturvve timaṅkalattu narākkaṇ
n Arumoḻiyāna Uttamacoḻa brahma mārāyar mārāciyār teccappaṉ cempiyanmātevi Uṭaiyārkku Iravum paka
lum Erivatarkku Oru tirunon=tā viḷakkiṉukku vaiytta kācu 100 Ikkācu nūṟum koṇṭu Āṭu 9 10 koṇṭu can=ti rātittaval Iravum
pakalum Ittirunon=tā viḷakku Eriya nāṅkaḷum Eṅkaḷ varkattārum Aṭṭakkaṭavomenṟu manṟāṭi kāri Aṟaiyan koṇṭa kācu 3 10 7 I
nāl Āṭu 3 10 3�- nāl Āṇṭuvarai Aṭṭakkaṭava ney 3 10 3� 3-� m Ēkaviran Araṅkanum Ekaviran peṟṟānum koṇṭa kācu 10 2 I-nāl Ā
ṭu 10 1 va-nāl Āṇṭuvarai Aṭṭakkaṭava ney 10 1�- m cāttan Āccan koṇṭa kācu 2 10 5- nāl Āṭu 2 10 2 I-nāl Āṇṭu
varai Aṭṭakkaṭava ney 2 10 2� 2�- m Araṅkan kaṇavatiyum Araṅkan maḻuvāṭiyum Araṅkan kāṭukāḷum koṇṭa kācu 10 2 I Āṭu
10 1 va-nāl Āṇṭuvarai Aṭṭakkaṭava ney 10 1[�*]�- m Araṅkan pāṇṭan koṇṭa kācu 10 2 I-nāl Āṭu 10 1 va nāl Āṇṭuvarai
Aṭṭankaṭava ney 10 1� m Āka Ivvanaivomāyk koṇṭa kācu 100 nāl Āṭu- 9 10- nāl Āṇṭu varai Aṭṭakkaṭava ney 9 10�- m ca
n=ti rātittavala nāṅkaḷum Eṅkaḷ varkkattārum Aṭṭakkaṭavomānom Ivvanaivom Itu panmā heśa rar rakṣai .—
Digital edition of SII 5.637 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
